item.description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones
media:content.media:description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones

item.description: Democrat Xavier Becerra and Republican Steven Hilton addressed supporters as voters took to the polls in California’s governor primary.

media:content.media:title: California governor candidates address supporters
media:content.media:description: Democrat Xavier Becerra and Republican Steven Hilton addressed supporters as voters took to the polls in California’s governor primary.

item.title: California governor candidates address supporters

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: Rep. Randy Feenstra conceded to businessman Zach Lahn in Iowa’s Republican primary for governor as party voters rejected President Donald Trump’s late endorsement in the race.

media:content.media:text: Syndication: The Des Moines Register
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Randy Feenstra
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

media:content.media:text: Iowa State Auditor Rob Sand
media:content.media:description: Iowa Republican gubernatorial candidate Zach Lahn speaks at the Republican Party of Polk County’s Lincoln Dinner in Des Moines on March 26.

item.title: In Iowa primary for governor, Trump’s pick concedes to MAHA-backed candidate

item.description: Watch live coverage as Secretary of State Marco Rubio testifies before a Senate Appropriations Subcommittee.

media:content.media:title: Rubio testifies at Senate hearing
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Secretary of State Marco Rubio testifies before a Senate Appropriations Subcommittee.

item.title: Rubio testifies at Senate hearing

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
Dennis Romero
item.description: A California man with a violent criminal history who was a registered sex offender was killed by law enforcement early Wednesday morning after barricading himself on the second floor of a Bakersfield building, where he strapped explosives to himself and several hostages.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX California Man Barricaded
media:content.media:description: FBI agents respond after a man barricaded himself inside a building with hostages Tuesday, June 2, 2026, in Bakersfield, Calif.

item.title: California standoff suspect is dead and all 10 hostages are freed

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss, speaking to network employees Wednesday about the firing of “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley, said newsroom leaders could not “find a way back” with the veteran journalist — a comment he flatly rejected in a statement of his own

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Bari Weiss, left, and Scott Pelley
media:content.media:description: Bari Weiss; Scott Pelley.

item.title: CBS News’ Bari Weiss addresses ‘unfortunate’ firing of Scott Pelley

item.dc:creator: Rich Schapiro
item.description: It was one of the strangest Covid fraud cases brought by the Justice Department, with the kind of wild details that seemed ripped from a Hollywood script

media:content.media:text: The Edwards family, from left, son Josh, Pastor Evan, wife Mary Jane, and daughter Joy.
media:content.media:description: The Edwards family, from left, son Josh, Pastor Evan, wife Mary Jane, and daughter Joy.

media:content.media:text: Josh Edwards is taken into custody outside the Edwards family’s New Smyrna Beach home.
media:content.media:description: Josh Edwards is taken into custody outside the Edwards family’s home in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., on Dec. 14, 2022.

media:content.media:text: The family’s New Smyrna Beach house.
media:content.media:description: The family’s New Smyrna Beach house.

item.title: Florida pastor and son’s $8 million Covid fraud case comes to bizarre end

item.dc:creator: Pilar Melendez
item.description: Moments before Santiago Campos took the stage at the News & Documentary Emmy Awards in New York City to accept a CBS News-funded scholarship in front of some of the most powerful people in TV news, veteran “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley took the time to offer the high school senior some advice.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Scott Pelley, left, and Santiago Campos
media:content.media:description: Scott Pelley; Santiago Campos.

item.title: Student who called out CBS at News Emmys says Scott Pelley ‘did the right thing’

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Auburn University student James “Weston” Higginbotham went missing in Japan, with loved ones fearing he may be “emotionally distressed.”

media:content.media:text: Auburn University.
media:content.media:description: Auburn University in Auburn, Ala.

item.title: After Auburn student goes missing in Japan, family fears he’s ‘emotionally distressed’

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh

media:content.media:text: Kerry Sheron, right, a Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said.

item.title: Navy vet charged with murder after attack on man known for pro-Trump displays

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Andrew Greif
Tim Rohan
item.description: The NBA Finals are finally here, and what a matchup we have.

media:content.media:text: Aerial view of Tomas Hertl scoring a goal past other players on the ice
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Stephon Castle hangs from the basket after dunking
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: The Stanley Cup seen at center ice
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Charles De Ketelaere, left, and Luka Modric run on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Tomas Hertl of the Vegas Golden Knights scores the eventual game winning goal past Frederik Andersen of the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period in Game One of the 2026 Stanley Cup Final at Lenovo Center on June 2, 2026.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Vegas stuns Carolina in Game 1 to open Stanley Cup Final

item.dc:creator: Nicole Acevedo
item.description: The JetBlue plane received an onboard alert warning about another nearby aircraft that was “not in communications with air traffic control,” according to the FAA.

media:content.media:text: A JetBlue Airways Airbus A321 airplane approaches San Diego International Airport
media:content.media:description: The midair scare occurred Monday evening as JetBlue Flight 1256 approached the Fort Lauderdale International Airport.

item.title: FAA probes close call between JetBlue plane and aircraft near Fort Lauderdale Airport

item.dc:creator: Jane C. Timm
item.description: After 10 states enacted new congressional maps, Republicans are in position to gain up to 16 seats this fall, compared to six for the Democrats, as the parties vie for control of the House.

media:content.media:text: Bloomberg Best Of The Year 2025
media:content.media:description: The 2026 redistricting cycle began last year in Texas at President Trump's urging.

item.title: Where the redistricting fight stands heading into the midterms

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists share their product recommendations and shopping tips for supportive, comfortable insoles that can help with arch pain, plantar fasciitis and more.

media:content.media:text: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: A rodeo rider whose horse was stabbed over the weekend in a Las Vegas barn said Tuesday she came “face-to-face” with the teenager charged with attacking her mare and two other horses.

media:content.media:text: A horse stands in an outdoor barn with white ointment covering three wounds and a wrap covering its face
media:content.media:description: South Point Casino in Las Vegas.

media:content.media:text: A horse stands in an outdoor barn with white ointment covering three wounds and a wrape covering its face
media:content.media:description: South Point Casino in Las Vegas.

media:content.media:text: Arielle Phillips rides a horse inside of a stadium
media:content.media:description: South Point Casino in Las Vegas.

item.title: Teen accused of stabbing horses at Las Vegas race was ‘stalker,’ rodeo rider says
